topics.name: 100 - 200 Level: UNILAG Foundation Sciences & Programming
topics.description: CSC 101, CSC 102, CSC 201 Object-Oriented Programming, MAT 101, and General Studies at UNILAG.

subtopics.name: CSC 101 & CSC 102: Introduction to Computer Science (UNILAG)
objectives: Master computing fundamentals, Python programming, logic design, and Linux CLI at UNILAG Yaba

subtopics.name: CSC 201 & CSC 202: OOP with Java & Discrete Mathematics
objectives: Implement data structures, OOP design patterns, Boolean algebra, graph theory, and automata

topics.name: 300 - 400 Level: UNILAG Systems, Cloud, AI, SIWES, and B.Sc. Thesis
topics.description: Operating Systems, DBMS, Software Engineering, Cloud Computing, AI, SIWES, and UNILAG Thesis.

subtopics.name: CSC 301 & CSC 302: Operating Systems, Databases, and SIWES
objectives: Analyze process scheduling, memory virtualization, SQL database design, and complete 6-month Yaba Tech Hub SIWES

subtopics.name: CSC 401 & CSC 499: Artificial Intelligence & B.Sc. Research Project
objectives: Develop deep learning models, cloud backend systems, and defend UNILAG B.Sc. research project
